note: Appending a cell to a row is unusual — normally cells are seeded at row-Add time. This op exists for completeness.

fill.description: cell background fill. Accepts a solid color (hex, named, rgb(...)), 'none' for explicit no-fill, or a gradient string 'COLOR1-COLOR2[-ANGLE]' (e.g. 'FF0000-0000FF-90'). Stored as a:solidFill / a:gradFill / a:noFill on a:tcPr.
fill.readback: #RRGGBB uppercase, 'gradient' (with separate 'gradient' key), or 'image' for picture fill

border.all.description: all four cell edges. Format: 'WIDTH[ DASH][ COLOR]' (e.g. '1pt solid FF0000') or 'STYLE;WIDTH;COLOR[;DASH]' (style ignored — kept for docx parity). DASH ∈ solid|dot|dash|lgDash|dashDot|sysDot|sysDash. Use 'none' to clear. Alias: border. Stored as a:lnL/lnR/lnT/lnB on a:tcPr. Cross-format note: docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' — pptx is more lenient.

border.top.description: top edge (a:lnT). Format same as border.all. Cross-format note: docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' — pptx is more lenient.

border.bottom.description: bottom edge (a:lnB). Format same as border.all. Cross-format note: docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' — pptx is more lenient.

border.left.description: left edge (a:lnL). Format same as border.all. Cross-format note: docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' — pptx is more lenient.

border.right.description: right edge (a:lnR). Format same as border.all. Cross-format note: docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' — pptx is more lenient.

border.tl2br.description: diagonal from top-left to bottom-right (a:lnTlToBr). Format same as border.all. Cross-format note: docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' — pptx is more lenient. Add/Set only — Get does not surface diagonal borders today.

border.tr2bl.description: diagonal from top-right to bottom-left (a:lnBlToTr). Format same as border.all. Cross-format note: docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' — pptx is more lenient. Add/Set only — Get does not surface diagonal borders today.

baseline.description: first run baseline offset for the cell text (percent units; positive=raised).

gridSpan.description: horizontal merge span — number of grid columns this cell spans (>=2 means merged across).

hmerge.description: true on cells continued from a horizontal merge anchor (CT_TableCell @hMerge).

image.relId.description: relationship id of an embedded image used as the cell's blip fill.
